description_long: This hamburger features a golden-brown sesame seed bun with a slightly domed top, lightly speckled with sesame seeds. The filling consists of a large, crispy fried chicken fillet that extends beyond the edges of the bun, giving it a hearty and substantial appearance. Beneath the chicken, there is a layer of green lettuce, adding a fresh contrast in both color and texture. The bun appears soft and pillowy, while the chicken fillet is rugged and crunchy, with visible craggy breading. The overall look is appetizing and classic, reminiscent of popular fast-food chicken sandwiches. No packaging or additional condiments are visible in any view.
description: A crispy fried chicken sandwich with a sesame seed bun, lettuce, and a large, golden chicken fillet. The sandwich looks fresh and appetizing with a soft bun and crunchy filling.
description_view_0: The sandwich is seen with the chicken fillet and lettuce peeking out from the side, and the sesame seed bun is clearly visible on top.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the thick, crispy chicken fillet extending from the bun, with a good view of the lettuce beneath.
description_view_2: The chicken fillet dominates the view, showing its rough, crunchy texture, while the bun appears slightly compressed.
description_view_3: The lettuce is most visible here, tucked under the chicken fillet, and the bun's smooth, rounded top is prominent.
attribute_topping_arrangement: Lettuce is placed beneath the fried chicken fillet, with the fillet itself being the dominant central layer. The toppings are distributed unevenly, with lettuce visible mostly on one side.
